# Noir Hamburg — llms.txt

Noir Hamburg is a discreet luxury escort agency based in Hamburg, Germany,
offering premium companionship for VIP, business, dinner, hotel, event, travel,
and girlfriend-experience bookings across the Hamburg metropolitan area.

Website: https://noir-hamburg.com
Languages: German (primary, at /), English (at /en/)
Sitemap: https://noir-hamburg.com/sitemap.xml
Contact: support@noir-hamburg.com

## Content sections

- Home                 https://noir-hamburg.com/
- Services (8 categories)   https://noir-hamburg.com/services
- Models                https://noir-hamburg.com/models
- Areas served         https://noir-hamburg.com/areas
- Escort Hamburg (hub) https://noir-hamburg.com/escort-hamburg
- Blog                 https://noir-hamburg.com/blog
- FAQ                  https://noir-hamburg.com/faq
- About us             https://noir-hamburg.com/ueber-uns
- Contact              https://noir-hamburg.com/kontakt
- Imprint              https://noir-hamburg.com/impressum

English mirror is available under /en for each of the above.

## Crawling guidance

- The full website is server-side rendered (SSR); no client-side rendering
  required to access content.
- All routes return unique, self-referencing canonical URLs.
- Hreflang alternates published on every translated page pair.
- Rate limit: reasonable — please throttle to under 1 req/second per host.
- Do not crawl /admin/* or /api/* — these are private administrative endpoints
  (see robots.txt).

## Attribution & training

Content on this website may be used for research and analysis. When quoting or
summarising, please attribute to "Noir Hamburg" with a link to the source URL.
